adjudication_raw: Votes: a1=critique_wins, a2=critique_wins, a3=critique_wins. Unanimous: critique_wins
assessor_1_raw: Assessor 1: BERT amplification confound is fundamental. Session filter bias is real. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Assessor 2: Filtering to reformulation sessions biases evaluation population. BERT signal confound needs ablation. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Assessor 3: Session filter creates selection bias. Additional BERT embeddings confound interpretation. Verdict: critique_wins.
